name: Wrong doctor said no work link for neck, what to do in Draper?
description: Seek new eval, appeal with better proof.

mainEntity.name: Wrong doctor said no work link for neck, what to do in Draper?

acceptedAnswer.text: Seek new eval, appeal with better proof.
acceptedAnswer.description: **Get second opinion or IME; challenge with your treating doc.** Carrier IMEs biased sometimes.[2] Key factors: Independent evaluator; appeal denial; causation battle. Utah allows rebuttal evidence.[1] Lawyer coordinates.
